Venue Info
Media Gallery
Talking Stick Resort Amphitheatre
Phoenix, AZ
Previous Names:
Desert Sky Pavilion (Changed after 1996)
Blockbuster Desert Sky Pavilion (Changed after 2001)
Cricket Pavilion (Changed after 2007)
Cricket Wireless Pavilion (Changed after 2010)
Ashley Furniture HomeStore Pavilion (Changed after 2013)
Ak-Chin Pavilion (Changed after 2023)
Seating Capacity: 19000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 15
  DMB  (15)

Longest Performance:
08.30.05 - Seek Up (21:34)
Venue Picture
Description
Cricket Wireless Pavilion is located at 2121 N. 83rd Ave. in Phoenix.
